user.title: Suntek LTE Camera
user.description: Enter the same login and password used for your SuntekCam trail camera. The next step lets you pick the camera.

select_device.title: Select camera
select_device.description: Choose the Suntek LTE trail camera to add to Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Suntek cloud. Try again later.
error.cannot_validate: Could not validate this camera with the Suntek cloud.
error.invalid_device: The Suntek cloud did not find this camera. Check the login / IMEI.
